hero.description: An extraordinary gathering of faith, fire and fellowship. Come encounter the transforming power of God's grace.

paragraphs: Reboot Camp North America is a three-day gathering of thousands of people from across Canada and the United States. It's an extended time of worship, teaching, prayer, and genuine human connection.
Whether you've been part of a church for years, or you're walking into something like this for the very first time — you belong here.
Under the theme {theme}, this isn't just another gathering - it's an encounter.

Three days. 
One city. 
An encounter that could change everything.

verse.text: "And with great power the apostles gave witness to the resurrection of the Lord Jesus. And great grace was upon them all."

about.richHeading: Get ready for a R.I.C.H experience

rich.desc: Come tired. Leave renewed. This is a space built for restoration — of faith, of purpose, of fervor.
The Word of God taught with precision, depth and accuracy. Not surface. Not performance. Truth that holds
Live worship. Community. Joy. When thousands gather in faith, miracles happen. Come ready to receive your miracles, grow in faith, and help others encounter theirs
Lives change at Reboot Camp. Come encounter Christ, discover endless life in Him, and find what you've been searching for

schedule.subtitle: All sessions are free and open to all registered attendees. Times are approximate and subject to change.
schedule.footnote: * Schedule is subject to change. All times are Eastern Time (ET).

main.name: Apostle Emmanuel Iren
main.title: Lead Pastor, Celebration Church International
main.bio: Apostle Emmanuel Iren is the visionary founder and lead pastor of Celebration Church International, a dynamic teaching ministry dedicated to spreading the gospel and helping people discover their purpose in Christ. With a passion for the Word of God and a heart for missions, Apostle Iren has led the church to establish Over 40 campuses across Nigeria, UK, Europe, Australia, Canada, and the USA, all while inspiring countless lives to grow in their faith and embrace the life-changing power of Christ.

invited.name: Tomi Favored
invited.title: Songwriter, speaker, worshipper and evangelistic gospel music minister

childcare.description: Child care service is available at RBC'26 North America. Our dedicated CelebKids team will care for your children so you can fully engage in every session.
childcare.compulsoryNote: All children attending must be registered in advance. Unregistered children cannot be admitted to child care. Spots are limited — register early.

faqs.q: Is the child care service available for each Reboot Camp session?
faqs.a: Yes, the Celebkids team would be ready to take in your child(ren) and care for them till the end of each session.

faqs.q: Do I need to register my child?
faqs.a: Yes, please! Every child must be registered so we can keep accurate records, prepare and ensure their safety at all times. Register now at the link provided on this page.

faqs.q: Are there any requirements when bringing my child(ren)?
faqs.a: You will be required to check in your child at the designated area before they can enter the CelebKids Centre. This is to ensure that they are accounted for during that session.

faqs.q: Is it compulsory to pick up my child after each session?
faqs.a: Yes, it is. You will be required to pick up your child immediately at the end of each session and drop them off at the beginning of the next session.

faqs.q: Are parents allowed to come in and feed their child(ren)?
faqs.a: Only nursing mothers are allowed in the designated area to nurse their child. Every other child will be well fed (advisable to have their meals packed) and cared for throughout the camp meeting.

faqs.q: Will my child be fed during the sessions at the CelebKids Centre?
faqs.a: Snacks and drinks will be provided for all children during every session of the meeting. However, we recommend that parents bring packed meals in case your child desires to eat more food.

faqs.q: Is there an age limit for kids at the CelebKids Centre?
faqs.a:
We would be catering to the following age groups:
• TenderFoot: Ages 1–4
• LightTroopers: Ages 5–8
• Tribe of Truth: Ages 9–13

faqs.q: Can I bring my child in if he/she has a cold?
faqs.a: For the safety of the other kids and the swift recuperation of your child, we would be unable to bring in children who are down with a visible cold or the flu.

faqs.q: What would be done if my child has an emergency situation?
faqs.a: Parents would be contacted immediately in the case of an emergency, while we do our best to ensure the child(ren) is in the best possible condition. Parents are advised to keep their contact line available at all times. A trained first aid team will also be on-site to ensure your child's safety.

faqs.q: What kind of activities would my child be involved in during the Reboot Camp sessions?
faqs.a: While you enjoy all God has prepared for you, your child is not left out! All children will be in a fun, nurturing environment filled with exciting learning and engaging activities they'll love. We are committed to ensuring they have a full and beautiful experience.

faqs.q: What happens if my child loses a belonging?
faqs.a: If your child loses a belonging at the CelebKids Centre, please speak with an instructor to check the lost and found box at the check-in area.

faqs.q: I have more questions — how can I reach the CelebKids team?
faqs.a: If you have questions or special requests, we'd love to hear from you! Send us an email at ccicelebkidsca@gmail.com and we'll be happy to help.

transport.label: Subsidized Transportation Service
transport.heading: Need a Ride?
transport.desc: The cost of transportation has been subsidized to convey members to and from designated stops to the RBC NA venue. Register now to secure your seat on the shuttle.
transport.heroSub: Subsidized shuttle transportation is available to and from designated stops at the venue.

faqs.q: Is there transportation to the venue?
faqs.a: Yes, there is subsidized transportation from various locations across the GTA and environs.

faqs.q: Is transportation free?
faqs.a: No. This is a subsidized transportation service, meaning participants will pay a portion of the cost while the remaining balance will be covered by the Church.

faqs.q: When is the registration deadline?
faqs.a: The registration deadline is August 8th.

faqs.q: What are the locations where transportation would be available?
faqs.a:
Transportation is only available in the following locations:

Brampton, Mississauga, Oshawa, Scarborough, Markham, Richmond Hill, North York, Etobicoke, Downtown, Midtown, Barrie, Vaughan, Hamilton, London, and Kitchener.

Each location will have one or more designated pickup stops for attendees.

faqs.q: What do I need to take part in the transportation scheme?
faqs.a:
You only need to:
• Register for transportation, and
• Join the WhatsApp group assigned to your location to stay abreast of key information about the service.

faqs.q: Am I eligible for a refund?
faqs.a: No refunds will be issued. However, the registration deadline of August 8th provides enough time for participants to make their decision before registering.

faqs.q: How will I know my pickup location and time?
faqs.a: Pickup locations and departure times will be shared in your location-specific WhatsApp group after registration.

faqs.q: Can I choose any pickup location?
faqs.a: You are expected to select the pickup location closest to and most convenient for you during registration.

faqs.q: What happens if I miss the bus?
faqs.a: Unfortunately, buses will leave at the scheduled departure time. Participants who miss the bus may need to arrange their own transportation.

faqs.q: Can I transfer my spot to someone else?
faqs.a: Please contact the transportation team before making any transfer arrangements. Unauthorized transfers are not permitted.

faqs.q: Will there be return transportation?
faqs.a: Yes, payment is for round trip only.

faqs.q: Can I register after the deadline?
faqs.a: Late registrations are not allowed.

faqs.q: Can non-CCI members use the transportation service?
faqs.a: Yes, the subsidized transportation service is open to the public.

faqs.q: Will seats be assigned on the bus?
faqs.a: No, seating will generally be on a first-come, first-served basis unless otherwise stated.

faqs.q: Who do I contact for transportation questions or issues?
faqs.a: Please send an email to canada@joincci.org for questions about registration. For questions after registration, contact your transportation coordinator or send a message in your assigned WhatsApp group for assistance.

faqs.q: What if I joined the wrong WhatsApp group?
faqs.a: Please leave the incorrect group and join the correct one based on your pickup location.

faqs.q: Can I get picked up outside the designated stops?
faqs.a: No. Pickups will only happen at the approved pickup locations communicated by the transportation team.

faqs.q: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs.a: Payment instructions and accepted methods are provided during the registration process.

aboutCity.heading: About Toronto
aboutCity.text: Toronto is Canada’s largest city and a global cultural hub. Known for its diversity, stunning skyline, and warm hospitality, Toronto is the perfect host city for Reboot Camp NA. The city is easily accessible from major North American cities via Pearson International Airport (YYZ) or Billy Bishop Airport (YTZ).

Rideshare or walk approx. 10 min to 272 Attwell Dr

directions.title: By Bus (TTC)

Route 37 (Islington) connects from Islington Subway Station
Check ttc.ca for real-time schedules and trip planner

directions.title: By Car / Rideshare

From downtown: Gardiner Expressway W → Hwy 427 N → Dixon Rd E

faqs.contactText: Can’t find your answer here? Email us at
faqs.stillHaveQsText: Our team is happy to help. Reach out and we’ll respond within 24–48 hours.

items.a: Yes! Registration and attendance at all sessions of Reboot Camp North America 2026 are completely free. There is no ticket price or entry fee. We simply ask that you register so we can plan effectively for the gathering.

Reboot Camp is open to all — believers, seekers, young and old, individuals and families. Whether you're a long-time Christian or just beginning your faith journey, you are warmly welcome. All nationalities are welcome.

items.q: Do I need to book accommodation in advance?
items.a: We strongly recommend booking accommodation early, especially for out-of-town attendees. Toronto is a busy city and accommodation near the venue can fill up quickly around our event dates. Check our Accommodation section for partner hotel rates.

items.q: Can I attend if I’m not a member of a specific church?
items.a: Absolutely. Reboot Camp is non-denominational. People from all churches, backgrounds and walks of life attend. You do not need to belong to any particular church or denomination.
Yes. Children’s sessions and supervised childcare will be available during key programme times. Please indicate your childcare needs on the registration form so we can make adequate arrangements.

items.q: Is there parking at the venue?
items.a: Yes, there is ample free parking available at the venue (500+ spots). For public transit users, the venue is accessible by TTC bus and subway. See our Venue section for detailed directions.

Yes! All main sessions will be recorded and available on our YouTube channel after the event. We also plan to livestream key evening sessions. Follow us on social media for livestream links closer to the event date.

Bring your Bible, a notebook, an open heart, and a faith expectation! The venue is air-conditioned, so you may want a light jacket. Comfortable clothing is encouraged. Food and beverages will be available for purchase on-site.
There is no strict dress code. We encourage smart casual or semi-formal attire, but what matters most is that you come with a heart ready to receive. Please dress modestly and comfortably.

There will be an opportunity to give during services, but giving is completely voluntary. No one will be pressured. You can also give online via our Giving section. All proceeds support the ministry and future camps.

giving.description: Reboot Camp NA is free to attend, but it takes significant resources to host. Your generous giving makes it possible for thousands to encounter God. Every gift, large or small, makes an eternal difference.

scripture.text: "Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."

giving.trustNote: All online transactions are secured with SSL encryption. Receipts are available upon request. We are a registered non-profit and operate with full financial transparency.

options.title: Online Giving
options.description: Give securely online via credit/debit card or Pre-authorized Debit. Quick and easy.

options.title: E-Transfer (Canada)

options.title: International Giving
options.description: For international supporters, use Wise or PayPal for currency-friendly transfers.
